# Collisional Ionization Equilibrium (CIE) Ion Fractions
#
# This file provides temperature-dependent ion fraction data for a set of
# astrophysically relevant elements under the assumption of collisional
# ionization equilibrium (CIE). The ion fractions represent the fractional
# abundance of each ionisation stage as a function of logarithmic temperature.
# The data are computed using the non-equilibrium multi-ion framework described in:
# Mathew, A., Mackey, J., Celeste, M., Haworth, T. J., & Mellema, G. (2025),
# A&A, 695, A73, doi:10.1051/0004-6361/202452373.
#
# This dataset is generated using the NEMOv1 framework coupled with the PION MHD code.
#
# Units:
#   Temperature: Kelvin (log10 scale)
#   Ion fractions: dimensionless
#
# Format:
#   log_T  h_1 h_2 he_1 he_2 he_3 ... fe_27
#
# All ion fractions are normalised such that, for each element:
#   sum_i f_i = 1
#
log_T h_1 h_2 he_1 he_2 he_3 c_1 c_2 c_3 c_4 c_5 c_6 c_7 n_1 n_2 n_3 n_4 n_5 n_6 n_7 n_8 o_1 o_2 o_3 o_4 o_5 o_6 o_7 o_8 o_9 ne_1 ne_2 ne_3 ne_4 ne_5 ne_6 ne_7 ne_8 ne_9 ne_10 ne_11 si_1 si_2 si_3 si_4 si_5 si_6 si_7 si_8 si_9 si_10 si_11 si_12 si_13 si_14 si_15 s_1 s_2 s_3 s_4 s_5 s_6 s_7 s_8 s_9 s_10 s_11 s_12 s_13 s_14 s_15 s_16 s_17 fe_1 fe_2 fe_3 fe_4 fe_5 fe_6 fe_7 fe_8 fe_9 fe_10 fe_11 fe_12 fe_13 fe_14 fe_15 fe_16 fe_17 fe_18 fe_19 fe_20 fe_21 fe_22 fe_23 fe_24 fe_25 fe_26 fe_27
